steps.title: Strict publish sync gate
stopConditions: Stop if the worktree is dirty and no owner has requested staging, committing, pushing, tagging, releasing, or publishing.
Stop if upstream sync cannot be verified from the local git state.
steps.allowedClaimAfterClosure: The strict local sync gate passed at the recorded time.
steps.boundary: Committed gap-register snapshots do not close strict sync; only the runtime-only non-writing strict sync audit proves current local upstream sync.
steps.sourceNextAction: Run the runtime-only non-writing strict sync gate after the intended branch is pushed.

steps.title: Owner license decision
commands: Record the owner's explicit license or no-reuse decision in the release decision record.
stopConditions: Stop if no owner decision exists.
Stop if the request would require legal advice.
steps.allowedClaimAfterClosure: The owner recorded a license or no-reuse decision.
steps.boundary: Does not choose a license or provide legal advice.
steps.sourceNextAction: Owner chooses a reuse license or keeps the no-reuse boundary.

steps.title: One permissioned external weak artifact
commands: Collect one permissioned, user-submitted, or clearly redacted weak artifact.
stopConditions: Stop if permission, redaction, or submitter scope is unclear.
Stop if the artifact contains secrets or private personal data that should not enter the case trail.
steps.allowedClaimAfterClosure: One permissioned or clearly redacted weak artifact is available for a proof loop.
steps.boundary: Does not create external proof or grant permission.
steps.sourceNextAction: Collect one user-submitted, permissioned, or clearly redacted weak artifact.

steps.title: Completed permissioned before/after case
commands: npm run cli -- evidence:from-case path/to/case --out path/to/evidence.md --force
npm run cli -- evidence:review path/to/evidence.md --decision reviewed --reviewer "Reviewer Name" --note "Reviewed against the proof boundary."
stopConditions: Stop if the case lacks before/after artifacts.
Stop if the boundary check does not preserve what remains unproven.
Stop if reviewed evidence is missing.
steps.allowedClaimAfterClosure: A permissioned before/after case exists with reviewed evidence and explicit proof boundaries.
steps.boundary: Does not prove improvement, adoption, or outcome until the before/after case evidence exists.
steps.sourceNextAction: Run the reviewed artifact through the full case path and preserve the boundary check.

steps.title: npm package publication
commands: Owner-controlled npm publish command, only after license and sync gates close.
stopConditions: Stop if package.json remains private.
Stop if the license decision is pending.
Stop if strict sync has not passed.
steps.allowedClaimAfterClosure: The npm package was published only if owner-controlled publish evidence exists.
steps.boundary: Dry-run package checks are not npm publication.
steps.sourceNextAction: After license and sync gates close, owner decides whether npm publication is in scope.

steps.title: Tagged GitHub Action or Marketplace publication
commands: Owner-controlled git tag or GitHub Marketplace release flow, only after release gates close.
stopConditions: Stop if no tag or Marketplace release evidence exists.
Stop if the repository-local action metadata is the only evidence.
steps.allowedClaimAfterClosure: A tagged GitHub Action or Marketplace release exists only if release evidence is attached.
steps.boundary: Repository-local action metadata is not Marketplace publication.
steps.sourceNextAction: Owner decides whether a tagged public action release or Marketplace listing is in scope.

steps.title: Shipped plugin or connector proof
commands: Attach real installation, release, or connector availability evidence.
stopConditions: Stop if only local plugin scaffolds exist.
Stop if no install or release evidence can be attached.
steps.allowedClaimAfterClosure: A plugin or connector shipped only if install or release evidence exists.
steps.boundary: Local plugin scaffolds and install-readiness packets are not shipped plugins.
steps.sourceNextAction: Produce a real tagged plugin/action release or installation proof before shipped-plugin claims.

steps.title: Benchmarked productivity evidence
commands: Run the measurement protocol and review the resulting evidence packet.
stopConditions: Stop if no measured before/after study exists.
Stop if evidence has not been reviewed.
steps.allowedClaimAfterClosure: A benchmark result can be claimed only within the measured study boundary.
steps.boundary: Measurement protocol only; no benchmark claim without direct evidence.
steps.sourceNextAction: Run the measurement protocol and review the resulting evidence before productivity claims.

steps.title: External adoption evidence
commands: Create or collect a reviewed adoption evidence packet from templates/evidence-packet.md.
npm run cli -- claim:from-evidence path/to/reviewed-adoption-evidence.md --out path/to/bounded-claim.md
stopConditions: Stop if public repository visibility is the only evidence.
Stop if the evidence is not external, permissioned, or reviewed.
steps.allowedClaimAfterClosure: External adoption can be claimed only within the reviewed evidence packet boundary.
steps.boundary: Read-only public repository visibility is not external adoption.
steps.sourceNextAction: Collect and review real external usage evidence before adoption claims.

allowedClaim: Mimesis has a local gap closure plan that explains how each open gate can be closed with direct evidence.
disallowedClaim: The gap closure plan does not close gates, prove completion, publish, choose a license, create external proof, or prove adoption.
